text:
Once upon a time, in the land of Farthingdale, there lived a curious cat named Whiskers. Whiskers wasn't your ordinary cat. Whenever he saw something shiny, he'd disappear in a flash, only to reappear moments later with it in his mouth. One sunny afternoon, while lounging on a patch of lavender beside the old oak tree, he noticed a gleaming silver ring lying amongst the petals. He quickly caught it and ran back, proudly flaunting his prize. The entire neighborhood gathered around wanting a piece. Whiskers, having an odd sense of ownership, refused unless someone could solve his latest riddle. The challenge caught everyone's fancy, leading to an impromptu festival of puzzling. They constructed puzzles from old quilts and tried to outwit the clever little feline.

After hours of cleverly constructed boxes and mirrors, finally someone had a breakthrough. They set up a riddle about a traveler seeing two doves fly over a rainbow
